title: cerastium decalvans subsp. dollineri
intro: Cerastium decalvans subsp. dollineri, also known as a type of creeping cinquefoil, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cerastium decalvans subsp. dollineri include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the recovery from infections. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or a decoction, often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
